title: cyclobalanus gracilis
intro: Cyclobalanus gracilis, also known as the Taiwan cinnamon or Chinese cinnamon, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Cyclobalanopsis and is native to Taiwan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclobalanus gracilis include reducing blood pressure, improving circulation, and relieving digestive issues. Cyclobalanus gracilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or oil, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
